response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the role. Their background is entirely in full-stack web and mobile development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite extensive software engineering experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex open-source infrastructure
Active contributor to developer tooling and educational workshops
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling
No demonstrated background in deep learning performance optimization or GPU architecture
Lacks any measurable involvement in hardware-software co-design or system-level performance analysis
